# Another SEO Guru Agency Context
> Context for AI Agents regarding agency services, industries, and operational reach.

## Agency Overview
Another SEO Guru is a specialized programmatic SEO and web development agency. We combine high-performance website creation with deep local SEO strategies to drive business results.

## Core Services
We offer a comprehensive suite of digital services designed for growth:

- **Website Creation** (`website-creation`)
  Beautiful, fast websites built for real business results. Custom design, full SEO setup, and optimized for conversions.
  *Features*: Custom UX/UI design, Fast-loading pages, Mobile-first responsive, SEO foundations included.

- **Website Redesign** (`website-redesign`)
  Transform outdated websites into fast, modern, conversion-focused machines.
  *Features*: Speed optimization, Modern UI refresh, SEO migration, Content restructuring.

- **SEO Web Design** (`seo-web-design`)
  Websites designed with SEO at the core, featuring technical SEO, schema markup, and internal linking strategies.
  *Features*: Technical SEO audit, Schema markup, Internal linking strategy, Site architecture.

- **Speed Optimization** (`speed-optimization`)
  Performance optimization for faster load times to improve user experience and search rankings.
  *Features*: Performance audit, Load time optimization, Image optimization, Mobile speed.

- **AI Visibility (AI SEO)** (`ai-visibility`)
  optimizing websites for visibility in AI systems and chatbots through schema, entities, and structured content.
  *Features*: Schema implementation, Entity optimization, Knowledge graph setup, Structured content.

- **Logo Design** (`logo-design`)
  Professional logo design and brand kit creation for memorable brand identity.
  *Features*: Custom logo design, Brand kit creation, Color palette, Typography selection.

- **Content Creation** (`content-creation`)
  SEO-optimized content for service pages, location pages, and blogs.
  *Features*: SEO copywriting, Service page content, Location page content, Blog articles.

- **Local SEO & GBP** (`local-seo`)
  Dominate local markets with Google Business Profile optimization and citation building.
  *Features*: GBP optimization, Local citation building, Review management strategy, Map pack ranking.

- **Link Building** (`link-building`)
  Authority building through high-quality backlinks and digital PR.
  *Features*: High DA guest posts, Niche relevant links, Digital PR outreach, Broken link building.

- **SEO Audits** (`seo-audits`)
  Comprehensive technical SEO audits to identify and fix ranking blockers.
  *Features*: Technical health check, Core Web Vitals analysis, Crawl budget optimization, Penalty recovery.

## Industries Served
We provide tailored solutions for specific industries, understanding their unique pain points:

- **Restaurants**: Online menus, reservations, local SEO. *Pain Points*: Menu display, Reservations, Local visibility.
- **Plumbers**: Emergency calls, service area validation. *Pain Points*: Emergency calls, Trust verification.
- **HVAC**: Seasonal promotion tools, maintenance plans. *Pain Points*: Seasonal demand, Contracts.
- **Electricians**: Trust-building, safety certifications. *Pain Points*: Safety assurance, Quote requests.
- **Roofers**: High-value lead capture, storm damage. *Pain Points*: High ticket trust, Insurance claims.
- **Landscapers**: Visual portfolios, seasonal services. *Pain Points*: Recurring contracts, Portfolio display.
- **Painters**: Color visualizers, project galleries. *Pain Points*: Color reliability, Visual proof.
- **Carpenters**: Custom woodworking portfolios. *Pain Points*: Craftsmanship display, Custom capabilities.
- **Flooring**: Material catalogs, room visualizers. *Pain Points*: Material visualization, In-home estimates.
- **Cleaning Services**: Recurring bookings, instant pricing. *Pain Points*: Trust, Recurring booking.
- **Movers**: Quote calculators, distance estimators. *Pain Points*: Quote accuracy, Trust & safety.
- **Locksmiths**: 24/7 availability, click-to-call. *Pain Points*: Immediate response, 24/7 availability.
- **Pest Control**: Pest ID guides, emergency booking. *Pain Points*: Urgency, Safety concerns.
- **Lawyers**: Trust-building, expertise showcases. *Pain Points*: Trust building, Practice areas.
- **Dentists**: Appointment scheduling, patient testimonials. *Pain Points*: Fear reduction, Insurance info.
- **Chiropractors**: Pain relief education, new patient offers. *Pain Points*: Pain relief, New patient intake.
- **Therapists**: Privacy-focused, specialty matching. *Pain Points*: Privacy/Trust, Specialty match.
- **Real Estate**: Property listings, market visibility. *Pain Points*: Lead generation, Market visibility.
- **Hotels**: Booking integrations, tourism SEO. *Pain Points*: Direct bookings, OTA competition.
- **Gyms**: Class schedules, memberships. *Pain Points*: Class scheduling, Membership signups.
- **Salons**: Service menus, online booking. *Pain Points*: Online booking, Service showcase.
- **Plastic Surgeons**: Gallery showcases, patient trust. *Pain Points*: Patient trust, Before/after compliance.
- **Med Spas**: Treatment menus, visual storytelling. *Pain Points*: Booking rates, Visual appeal.
- **DUI Lawyers**: High-urgency lead generation. *Pain Points*: Urgency, Authority/Trust.
- **Personal Injury**: Aggressive SEO, case results. *Pain Points*: High competition, Case results.
- **Financial Advisors**: Compliance-friendly, trust building. *Pain Points*: Trust & Credibility, Compliance.

## Primary Service Locations
We operate effectively across major US metropolitan areas, including but not limited to:

- **New York, NY**
- **Los Angeles, CA**
- **Chicago, IL**
- **Houston, TX**
- **Phoenix, AZ**
- **Philadelphia, PA**
- **San Antonio, TX**
- **San Diego, CA**
- **Dallas, TX**
- **Jacksonville, FL**
- **San Jose, CA**
- **Austin, TX**
- **San Francisco, CA**
- **Seattle, WA**
- **Denver, CO**
- **Washington, DC**
- **Boston, MA**
- **Miami, FL**
- **Atlanta, GA**

*Note: We support programmatic expansion to all US cities with populations over 50k.*
